title: fimbristylis autumnalis subsp. taiwanica
intro: Fimbristylis autumnalis subsp. taiwanica, also known as Taiwan fimbristylis or Taiwanese grass-leaved fimbri, is a subspecies of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Fimbristylis autumnalis subsp. taiwanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
